description: CompositionBrown kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round slit neckline, embroidery along the neckline leading down to the waist with piping on the cuffs and on the vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe inspiration for this kurta from folklore for women is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart work-wear. The label combines the quirky street style of India's biggest metros with classic silhouettes. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian look. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
